song.title: Savior Lead Me up the Mountain
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Savior, lead me up the mountain, Where the Lord alone is seen, Where we hear the voice from heaven, Where the air is pure and clean.
[C] Chorus Lead me higher up the mountain, Give me fellowship with Thee; In Thy light I see the fountain, And the blood it cleanses me.
[V2] 2) Higher up where light increases, Far above all earthly strife, Where the strain of effort ceases, Where in Christ we reign in Life.
[V3] 3) Savior, keep me up the mountain Pressing on toward the goal, Till, as one, we share Thine image, And Thy love and grace extol.
song.author: William J. Pearson
